creator: empty.japan
caption:
Your epic journey with @allnipponairways starts HERE!

As a new ANA ambassador I was asked to create a perfect itinerary with some of the most hidden and jaw-dropping locations for my fellow ANA ambassador from the US, @karl_shakur, who is coming to Japan next year.

Stay tuned for the next reveal of our epic adventure!

Location in the video:
1 - Funaya (Ine), 
2 - private onsen in the mountains (Kobe)
3 - Kochidani Amida-ji Temple (Ohara)
4 - Mt. Atago (Kyoto)

#ANAambassador
